creator: toshio@aniani.com
text:
I tryed install netpbm-94.3.1.tgz from /stand/sysinstall.
But one command "pnmrotate" is not install from packages.
I checked it PLIST file then result I can not find pnmrotate.
Next I try make from ports, I succesfull install pnmrotate.
I did test pnmrotate and I got a good result.
I check 2.2.2 of this packages, I think it have same problem.
